slide_2_Idea_Problem_Solution_Value: AI readiness and AI-coding risk assessment is an untapped category with clear enterprise demand — productizable as standalone solution for SI projects and gov contracts
Enterprise-wide deployment within 1 day via single GitHub connection — legacy tools require 2 hrs per repo setup, meaning 3,000+ hrs for a 500-person dev organization
Serves both developers and executives on one platform — code quality and security for engineers plus business-level ROI visibility and accountability for the C-suite
GitHaven Scanner reads entire codebase via single GitHub connection to analyze code quality, AI readiness, and security risks — then proposes targeted remediations
GitHaven Manager gives executives a real-time dashboard of organization progress, project quality, and AI-driven productivity metrics — no manual reporting needed
GitHaven Cowork is a code-aware collaboration agent that lets PMs work on technical matters without dev overhead — saving ~20 hrs/week of communication cost per team
Enterprises adopted AI coding but have zero evidence of ROI — CTOs cannot tie Copilot-level investment to measurable business outcomes or productivity gains
Every 25% increase in AI coding usage drops code quality by 7% and 45% of AI-generated code carries security risks — no tool monitors this tradeoff at org level
Engineering managers rely on intuition and manual PM-tool input for dev org performance; no automated system measures AI coding productivity across the organization
slide_3_Market_1_3_TAM_SAM_SOM_+_Why_Now: Korea has fewer direct AI code governance competitors and strict labor laws intensify executive demand for AI activation — CTO network enables fast reference accounts
DORA 2025-2026 confirms AI coding raises verification burden and instability alongside speed; Bain says code assist alone yields only 10-15% ROI
GitHub Copilot pricing and metrics are global; AI coding governance gap identical across US, EU, India — EU AI Act and US EO 14110 drive regulatory demand

slide_9_Team_4_4_Strengths_&_Improvement: Strengths
● Market timing validated by public research
DORA, Bain, McKinsey, BCG all confirm AI coding creates verification burden — problem is structural, not hypothetical
● Problem definition is validated and solid
CTO ROI accountability for AI coding investment is a real gap — GitHub metrics alone do not explain business outcomes
● Korea beachhead less crowded than US
No direct AI code governance startup in Korea; CTO network can unlock initial reference accounts faster than in US market
Areas for Improvement
● Category crowded globally with funded rivals
Sonar shipped AI Code Assurance; Snyk launched AI Trust Platform; Qodo and CodeRabbit expanding fast — not a blank market
● Zero revenue with unproven conversion
All 4 LOIs are free PoC including Lotte Rental and SSG.com; $0 revenue with no paid conversion evidence yet
● Core claims publicly unverified
95%+ accuracy, 1-day enterprise deployment, 70% cost reduction — no public benchmark or customer-verified data exists
● Platform internalization risk is material
GitHub already provides Copilot usage metrics; Sonar and Snyk actively adding AI governance — feature absorption threat is real

slide_10_Investor_Assessment: Big market with high growth rate in demand
Enterprise-quality solutions do exist and started to compete, but no strong or dominant player at all
The team has built Al expertise in a 1st-tier global big tech so has strong potential for fast penetration and building moats locking in enterprises
While the team has secured several free PoC agreements with corporates, no evidence for WTP yet
Highly scalable as the same problem is common across the world
Excelent in tech and enterprise access, but not yet sure about their business capabilities since there's no evidence for WTP other than free trial
Overall Summary : Need to push the team to come up with more commercial evidence than free trials. Watch for additional month if they fail.

Key Risks : If LLMs and AI coding tools improve rapidly to the point where such AI-generated codes do not show conflicts or errors anymore, then the team's solution might be redundant or can price marginally
